summary_en: Kamgras 1 K.K. corrected its tender offer disclosure for Kakaku.com Inc. following receipt of FTC non-exclusion and prohibition period shortening notices on May 15, 2026.
title_en: Notice regarding correction of tender offer commencement announcement accompanying submission of corrected tender offer filing
translation_en_brief: On May 19, 2026, Kamgras 1 K.K. (represented by Robert Patrick Ryan) announced a corrected tender offer disclosure for Kakaku.com Inc. (Code 2371, TSE Prime Market). The correction was necessitated by the bidder's receipt on May 15, 2026 of two notices from Japan's Fair Trade Commission (FTC): (1) a notice that no exclusionary order would be issued, and (2) a notice shortening the prohibition period. The tender offer had commenced on May 13, 2026. The corrections relate to withdrawal conditions and related disclosure matters under the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act. Notably, the bidder reserves the right to withdraw the offer if certain material adverse events occur, including extraordinary dividends or share repurchases exceeding 10% of net assets (¥6,131 million threshold), as well as material misstatements or omissions discovered in the target's prior regulatory filings. The disclosure is a procedural correction required under Financial Instruments and Exchange Act Article 27-8(2), and does not constitute a change to the offer terms themselves.
